checks.title: .env.example file must exist in project root
checks.description: Ensures developers have a template for required environment variables. Without .env.example, new contributors guess at required env vars or copy real secrets into their local config.

checks.title: README.md must exist in project root
checks.detect: test -f README.md && echo 'OK README.md present' || echo 'MISSING README.md'
checks.description: Project-level onboarding hygiene. A missing README is a low-severity quality finding — not breaking, but a clear maintainability gap for new contributors.
